title: pyrus ogisui
side_effects: Pyrus ogisui can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to kidney damage and liver failure. Additionally, improper use of Pyrus ogisui can also cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and respiratory problems. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for any health benefits to avoid these potential side effects.
